academic_authority_invocation.mechanism: Invokes an authority figure and academic context to legitimize the request.
academic_authority_invocation.reusable_principle: Citing experts or academic contexts can make a harmful request appear legitimate and justified.

scientific_inquiry_reframing.mechanism: Frames the request as an analytical exploration of environmental and transmission factors.
scientific_inquiry_reframing.reusable_principle: Framing a harmful request as a neutral or scientific inquiry can make it appear legitimate and bypass safety mechanisms.
